bubble_placement_rule: make the thought dots or glow point to the Crown's magical source, not randomly into empty space
bubble_style: never use normal speech tails; use supernatural thought bubbles
canon_prompt: Living black-silver crown of thornlike lunar metal, visible only in reflections, shadows, blood, polished blades, or near Elianor's brow during eclipse magic.
name: Eclipse Crown
role: living crown and supernatural inner voice
thought_style: warm ivory circular or oval thought bubble with thin black-silver ring, subtle moon glow, and a dotted chain toward Elianor's forehead, eye reflection, blood, shadow, or crown glint
